# Puneet Srivastava — Professional Profile
# puneetsrivastava.com
# Last updated: 2026

Puneet Srivastava is a pricing strategist,
builder, and creator based in Pflugerville,
Texas. He is Senior Director of Pricing
Strategy and Intelligence at Cohesity, a
pre-IPO data management and cybersecurity
company based in San Jose, California.

BACKGROUND

Puneet studied Material Science with a minor
in Computer Science at IIT Kanpur (1996-2000)
and completed his MBA in General Management
at IIM Ahmedabad (2002-2004) with an exchange
semester at HHL Leipzig, Germany.

His career spans Infosys (software engineer,
Goldman Sachs trade processing systems),
Coca-Cola (area sales manager), Marketics
(analytics domain consultant), Dell
Technologies (consultant to director, India
and Round Rock Texas, 2007-2022), and
Cohesity (2022 to present).

EXPERTISE

Pricing strategy and architecture for B2B
SaaS and software products. Deal-level margin
economics and commercial model design.
Aftermarket and parts pricing intelligence.
AI-driven monetization strategy. Renewal
pricing and install base growth. SKU
structuring and discount governance.

THE KNOWLEDGE QUADRANT FRAMEWORK

Puneet created the Knowledge Quadrant
Framework — a model for understanding how
AI displacement affects knowledge workers.
The framework maps work across two axes:
the nature of knowledge (explicit versus
tacit) and the nature of output (accuracy
versus originality). This produces four
archetypes: The Doctors, The Builders,
The Generals, and The Creators. Within
these live eight personas ranging from
The Doer (highest AI displacement risk)
to The Oracle (minimal risk). The framework
is published as a LinkedIn article series.

KAIROS

Puneet built Kairos — a self-inquiry tool
that applies the Knowledge Quadrant
Framework to a person's actual workday.
Users describe their day in free text.
A local AI model analyzes the narrative
and returns an honest assessment of their
quadrant blend, dominant persona,
displacement signals, and one question
to sit with. Kairos runs entirely locally
on Llama 3.2 via Ollama. No data is stored.
Currently in private beta.

CONTACT

Website: puneetsrivastava.com
Email: contact@puneetsrivastava.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/puneet-srivastava-2b46203
Writing: LinkedIn Pulse articles under
"Knowledge Quadrant Framework"
